subject: Physics
title: E Equals mc Squared
description: A 1-minute de-risking session on E Equals mc Squared.

hook.text: The most famous equation in history says mass and energy are the same thing in different forms.

buildup.text: Einstein showed a tiny amount of mass contains enormous energy because c² is a huge number.

discovery.text: One kilogram of matter fully converted to energy would release 90 quadrillion joules.

twist.text: This equation explains why the Sun shines—it converts four million tons of mass into energy every second.

climax.text: It also made nuclear weapons possible. Einstein's equation unlocked both creation and destruction.

punchline.text: Mass is frozen energy. Five letters unlocked the secret.

quiz.question: What does E = mc² tell us about mass and energy?
options: They are interchangeable forms of the same thing
Energy creates new mass from nothing
Mass always decreases as energy increases
